---
title: "Data Inventories & Effective Meetings"
---

## Overview

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under Construction

## Learning Objectives

{{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD

## Preparation

{{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD
